$comment: Pre-curated, git-verified ground truth for adding Serilog as a fifth corpus repository (plan item B2). This file is intentionally NOT wired into corpus.json or prs.json yet: adding a repo is a full benchmark rebaseline, not an additive append (see the B2 research note in CHANGELOG.md). The base/head/merge SHAs and changed_cs sets below were derived locally from the repository's merge history and the PR titles fetched from the GitHub API, so a future rebaseline can drop these straight into corpus.json and prs.json without re-curating. Verified against serilog/serilog: each head commit checks out cleanly and each changed_cs path exists at that head. A layer2a run over the resulting 30-PR corpus moved the headline means (query 61 to 64, focus 92 to 90, changes 87 to 89, grep 38 to 37 percent), which is why the rebaseline must re-measure every layer and every per-feature A/B delta before publishing.
